name: Lemon Drop Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix the baking soda and flour separately.
4. Alternately stir the baking soda mixture into the egg mixture with half a cup of lemonade.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 8 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Turn off the heat and brush the cookies with remaining lemonade and powdered sugar.
8. Cool on wire racks.
